data.title: DOGE aims for $0.11-$0.12 with strong whale activity, 65% chance in 14 days. Support at $0.10.
data.description: After stabilizing above the $0.10 support level, Dogecoin is now poised for a potential increase to between $0.11 and $0.12 over the next two weeks. The presence of large whale investors indicates a bullish outlook, with a 65% likelihood of a moderate rally. This technical analysis suggests a positive trend in the coming days for the popular cryptocurrency.

data.title: Solana aims for $105 this week with whale accumulation fueling breakout, reaching $105-110 resistance on 63% long position. Institutional buying indicates no retail speculation.
data.description: Solana has surpassed all moving averages as whale long positions reach 63%, signaling a potential surge towards the $105-110 resistance level. The institutional accumulation pattern indicates that this upward trend is not merely driven by retail speculation.

data.title: Partnership formed between Google DeepMind and top consulting firms to accelerate AI adoption worldwide.
data.description: Google DeepMind has joined forces with Accenture, Bain, and other partners to address the AI adoption gap and introduce cutting-edge models to various industries worldwide. This collaboration marks a significant effort to advance AI technology and its integration, leveraging the expertise of multiple companies in the field. The partnership aims to enhance AI utilization across sectors and drive innovation, reflecting a commitment to bridging the gap in AI adoption.

data.title: BNB surpasses $680 in a week with strong momentum, positioning to continue rising. No room for sideways movement.
data.description: The recent surge in BNB saw it surpass $640, signaling a strong rally towards $680 fueled by increasing technical momentum and disciplined positioning. The current market setup suggests that sideways movements are unlikely to be sustained, prompting a push towards the $680 mark.

data.title: Bitcoin may reach $85K before potential reversal in May; institutional data implies 60% chance. Key resistance at $80K. Technical hurdles at $85K.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) is maintaining its position above important moving averages, indicating stability. Institutional investors are showing signs of reduced accumulation around the $80,000 resistance level. There is a technical convergence at $85,000, suggesting it could serve as the final area for distribution before an anticipated correction.

data.title: Altcoin Vector #51 by Glassnode & Swissblock released on April 22, 2026. Offers traders key altcoin setups and market insights.
data.description: Altcoin Vector #51, released on April 22, 2026 by Glassnode and Swissblock, provides traders with detailed analysis and high-conviction setups for altcoins in the market. The report aims to assist traders in making informed decisions about their trades. The latest edition includes analysis on several altcoins along with market insights to guide traders. This report is a valuable resource for traders looking to navigate the altcoin market effectively.

data.title: Coinbase transfers NY prediction market case to federal court, emphasizing jurisdiction dispute between CFTC and state regulators. (Read more)
data.description: Coinbase has chosen to move a lawsuit regarding prediction markets from New York court to federal court, highlighting the jurisdiction conflict between the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) and state regulators. This decision comes as the lawsuit delves into the regulatory oversight of prediction markets, a growing sector in the financial industry. The move underscores the ongoing legal battle over which entity has the authority to regulate such markets. This shift signifies a significant development in the case, as it transitions to a higher level of judicial scrutiny. Stay updated for more details on this evolving legal dispute.

data.title: Adam Back addresses speculation on being Satoshi at LONGITUDE event in Paris; OKX Europe CEO supports MiCA, calling it "extremely beneficial."
data.description: During the recent LONGITUDE event in Paris, Blockstream’s Adam Back addressed speculation about his identity as Satoshi Nakamoto. He explained why some believe he is the mysterious creator of Bitcoin. Additionally, the CEO of OKX Europe expressed strong support for the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulations, stating that they would be highly advantageous for the industry. This event attracted a significant audience, including industry professionals and enthusiasts, eager to learn more about the future of blockchain and cryptocurrency.

data.title: Crypto market surges as Bitcoin and Ether jump on US liquidity measures, record ETF inflows, easing recession fears. #BullsInControl
data.description: The prices of Bitcoin and Ether experienced significant spikes due to the infusion of liquidity measures in the US market and record-breaking inflows into spot ETFs. These increases in value managed to overshadow investors' worries about a potential recession and anxieties regarding the situation with Iran.

data.title: Core Scientific Announces Pricing of $3.3 Billion of Senior Secured Notes
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Core Scientific, Inc. (Nasdaq: CORZ) revealed that its subsidiary, Core Scientific Finance I LLC, has set the price for an offering of $3.3 billion in 7.750% senior secured notes due 2031. The Notes will be issued at 99.250% of their principal amount. This move signifies Core Scientific's position as a leader in digital infrastructure for high-density colocation. The Notes will be offered privately.
